user.title: Connect to your Samsung Frame TV
user.description: Enter your TV's IP address. If this is the first connection, a prompt will appear on your TV asking for authorization.

data_description.host: The IP or hostname of your TV (e.g., 192.168.1.50).
data_description.name: Display name for the device in Home Assistant.

pairing.title: Authorize on your TV
pairing.description: A pairing prompt should be visible on {device}. Select Allow (prefer 'Always allow'). After accepting, click Submit here to finish pairing. If no prompt appears, make sure the TV is awake and check Device Connection Manager > Access Notifications.

encrypted_pairing.title: Enter PIN from TV
encrypted_pairing.description: Please enter the PIN displayed on {device}.

data_description.pin: The PIN shown on your TV screen.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authorize {device}
reauth_confirm.description: The stored authorization for {device} is no longer valid. Make sure the TV is on, accept the authorization popup on the TV, then click Submit to re-pair.

discovery_confirm.title: Set up {device}
discovery_confirm.description: A Samsung TV ({device}) was found on your network. Set it up with Samsung Frame Art Director? You'll be asked to accept an authorization prompt on the TV next.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure {device}
reconfigure.description: Update the TV's IP address (e.g. after a DHCP change). It must be the same TV.

error.auth_missing: Authorization required. Accept the popup on your TV, then submit again.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the TV. Verify the IP, network, and that the TV is awake.
error.invalid_pin: PIN is invalid, please try again.
error.not_supported: This Samsung device is currently not supported.

abort.already_in_progress: A configuration flow is already in progress.
abort.reconfigure_successful: The TV address was updated successfully.
abort.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the TV. Verify it is on and reachable on the network.
abort.wrong_device: That address belongs to a different TV than the one configured here.

init.title: Samsung Frame Art Director Options
init.description: Everything here is optional and preconfigured. Add an AI key only if you want automatic tagging. Slideshow, matte and favorites are controlled by their own entities.

ai_tagging.name: AI Image Tagging
ai_tagging.description: Optional. Used to auto-tag images dropped into the inbox.

data_description.ai_provider: Which AI vision service tags images dropped into the inbox.
data_description.gemini_api_key: Required for Gemini. Get a free key at aistudio.google.com.
data_description.openai_api_key: Required for OpenAI. The 'openai' Python package must be installed.

cleanup.name: Storage Cleanup
cleanup.description: Controls how the TV's limited internal storage is pruned.

data.cleanup_only_integration_managed: Only delete images this integration uploaded

data_description.cleanup_max_items: Maximum artworks to keep on the TV; oldest are deleted first.
data_description.cleanup_max_age_days: Delete artworks older than this many days. 0 disables the age limit.
data_description.cleanup_only_integration_managed: Never deletes your own or Art Store items.
data_description.cleanup_dry_run: Preview cleanup in the logs without deleting anything.

folders.name: Folders & Image
folders.description: Where images live and how they are fitted to the screen.

data_description.inbox_dir: Folder watched by Process Inbox for new images to tag.
data_description.library_dir: Permanent folder for processed images used by rotation and the gallery.
data_description.resize_mode: 'Crop' fills the screen and may trim edges; 'Fit' shows the whole image with black bars (better for portraits).

data.use_wol_before_on: Send Wake-on-LAN before turning Art Mode on
data.use_power_key_on_off: Use the power key as an OFF fallback

data_description.mac_address: Needed only if you enable Wake-on-LAN.
data_description.use_power_key_on_off: If turning Art Mode off fails, send the TV's power key as a fallback.

advanced.name: Advanced
advanced.description: You usually don't need to change these.

data_description.ai_model: Leave blank for the recommended default (gemini-2.5-flash / gpt-4o).
data_description.enable_art_mode_settings: Brightness / color temp / motion / auto-brightness entities. Enabled by default; turn off if your TV or firmware rejects these settings. Reload the integration after changing.
data_description.diagnostics_verbose: Enable detailed debug logging for troubleshooting.
